nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=44 beats='Lila and Grandpa are at the sunny park; her big red balloon is tied to her wrist with a floppy bow; it bobs and tugs in the breeze like it wants to play; Lila skips down the path to show the ducks'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=42 beats='a big breeze whooshes by and the floppy bow wiggles loose; the red balloon slips off Lila’s wrist and floats up, up, just past her fingertips; Grandpa takes her hand and says quick, let’s follow it'>>

<<FILL role=setup words=38 beats='they trot after the balloon as it bounces along on the breeze, red and round against the blue sky; it drifts ahead of them toward the spot where the park path splits in two'>>

choices.label: Run to where the path splits.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='at the fork the balloon hangs in the air as if it is choosing too; the left path slopes down to the shiny duck pond and the balloon dips low that way; the right path climbs grassy kite hill and the wind tugs it high that way'>>

choices.label: Follow it down to the duck pond.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='down by the pond the balloon skims low over the water, its string trailing like a little tail; ducks quack and paddle after it in a bumpy line; the balloon drifts toward the tall reeds on the far bank'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Lila and Grandpa hurry along the bank while the duck line paddles beside them, quacking a cheer; up ahead, the balloon’s string catches in the tall reeds under the old willow tree'>>

choices.label: Go to the reeds by the willow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='the balloon bobs above the reeds, its string tangled just out of reach over the water; flat stepping stones lead out toward the willow, and a friendly paddle-boat lady in a sun hat waves from her little boat; Lila gets to pick how to get close'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='holding Grandpa’s hand, Lila tiptoes from stone to stone, splish, steady, splish; the ducks watch like an audience; at the last stone the red balloon bobs in the willow twigs right above her head'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='the balloon’s string is looped loosely on a bendy willow twig, just a little too high; Grandpa spots a long smooth stick by the bank, and the breeze keeps puffing at the leaves; Lila can reach up with the stick or wait for the breeze to lift the string free'>>

choices.label: Reach up with the long stick.
Wait for the breeze to help.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='Grandpa holds Lila steady while she stretches the long stick way, way up; the tip nudges the loop of string and it slides down the twig, closer and closer to her open hand'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='the string drops right into Lila’s hand; got it; she winds it twice around her wrist and Grandpa ties the bow extra tight; the ducks quack a hooray and the willow waves; Lila and Grandpa walk home with the big red balloon bouncing proudly'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Lila and Grandpa sit still on the last stone and watch; the breeze puffs once, twice, and the string slips free of the twig; but instead of coming down, the balloon floats gently out over the middle of the pond'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='the balloon drifts down and lands softly on the water, round and red like a little boat; one by one the ducks paddle over to it, circling it slowly, as if it is a brand new friend'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=48 beats='the ducks paddle in a proud circle around the red balloon boat, quacking a happy song, and the littlest duckling bobs beside it like a tiny guard; Lila giggles and waves from the stones; her balloon has become the leader of the duck parade, and that feels like a happy trade'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='the paddle-boat lady glides her little boat to the bank and helps Lila and Grandpa aboard; everyone holds on snug; out on the pond the red balloon bobs low over the water, its string dancing on the ripples'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='they pedal and pedal, splish splash splish; the ducks race alongside like an escort; the balloon skips ahead on the breeze, straight toward the big whooshing fountain in the middle of the pond'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='the fountain sprays a cool silver mist and the balloon bounces softly on top of it, boing, boing, like the fountain is juggling it; then it rolls down the spray, sliding closer and closer to the boat'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='plop; the big red balloon rolls right off the spray and lands in Lila’s open arms, cool and misty; the paddle-boat lady cheers and the ducks quack hooray; they pedal back to shore with the balloon riding in Lila’s lap like a round red captain'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='up the grassy hill they go, puff puff; the balloon climbs higher too, a round red dot against the white clouds; from partway up, Lila hears a jingly bell on the hillside and sees kites swooping at the top'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='the jingle comes from the ice-cream cart with its tall striped umbrella, parked on the hillside; above it, the kite kids fly swooping kites at the very top; the balloon wobbles in between them'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=44 beats='the balloon dips low toward the ice-cream cart’s tall striped umbrella, then bobs up toward the swooping kites at the top of the hill; it cannot make up its mind; Grandpa squeezes Lila’s hand and says she gets to pick where they try to catch it'>>

choices.label: Climb up to the kite kids.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='just as they reach the jingling cart, the balloon bumps softly against the tall striped umbrella and its string wraps once around the umbrella pole; the ice-cream man looks up from his scoops and smiles at his new balloon customer'>>

choices.label: Look up at the tangled string.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=42 beats='the string is wound around the pole up where the umbrella spreads, too high for Lila; the ice-cream man is very tall, and he keeps a little step stool behind the cart; Lila can ask him to reach it down or climb the stool and try herself'>>

choices.label: Ask the ice-cream man to reach it.
Climb the step stool and try.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='the ice-cream man wipes his hands, stands on his tiptoes, and unwinds the string, one loop, two loops; he catches the balloon before it can wiggle away and bows like a fancy waiter'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='he hands Lila the big red balloon like it is the fanciest sundae on the menu, and adds one small strawberry scoop for the brave balloon chaser; Lila ties the string tight, licks her ice cream, and grins at Grandpa; what a delicious rescue'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Lila climbs the little step stool while Grandpa holds her steady; she stretches way up on her tiptoes and her fingertips just brush the very end of the dangling string; almost, almost'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='right then a big gust swoops over the hill; the string spins loose off the pole, hops past Lila’s fingers, and the red balloon sails up and away over the treetops, smaller and smaller'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=48 beats='Lila’s chin wobbles as the red dot winks away behind the trees; the ice-cream man says a red balloon chaser deserves a red treat and hands her a strawberry cone; Grandpa hugs her close; the ice cream is sweet and cold, and next park day they will pick a new balloon together'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=40 beats='at the windy top of the hill the balloon rises in among the kites, bobbing like a round red kite that lost its tail; a kite kid named Jo grins and says her yellow kite can help'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=38 beats='Jo lets out string and her yellow kite swoops up beside the balloon; the kite’s long ribbon tail twirls gently around the balloon’s string, soft as a hug, and holds on tight'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=36 beats='hand over hand, Lila and Jo wind the reel together; down come the yellow kite and the red balloon, spinning slowly like leaves, lower and lower, until the string brushes Lila’s hands'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=46 beats='Lila holds her big red balloon at last and Jo takes back her clever yellow kite; all the kite kids cheer from the hilltop; Grandpa ties the string with a double bow, and Lila and her brand new friend fly one more kite before home'>>
